targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM serving.fact_prices
SELECT count(price_mad) AS value FROM serving.fact_prices
SELECT count(DISTINCT product_key) AS value FROM serving.fact_prices
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM serving.dim_source
SELECT min(t.year) AS first, max(t.year) AS last FROM serving.fact_prices f JOIN serving.dim_time t ON f.time_key=t.time_key

SELECT make_date(t.year, COALESCE(t.month,1), 1) AS time, p.product_id AS metric, f.price_mad AS value FROM serving.fact_prices f JOIN serving.dim_product p ON f.product_key=p.product_key JOIN serving.dim_time t ON f.time_key=t.time_key WHERE p.category='Meat' AND f.price_mad IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

SELECT make_date(t.year,1,1) AS time, p.product_id AS metric, f.original_value AS value FROM serving.fact_prices f JOIN serving.dim_product p ON f.product_key=p.product_key JOIN serving.dim_time t ON f.time_key=t.time_key WHERE p.product_id IN ('CPI-NATIONAL','INFLATION-NATIONAL') AND t.month IS NULL ORDER BY 1
SELECT s.source_id, count(*) AS observations FROM serving.fact_prices f JOIN serving.dim_source s ON f.source_key=s.source_key GROUP BY s.source_id ORDER BY observations DESC

SELECT p.product_id, p.category, count(*) AS points, min(t.year) AS first_year, max(t.year) AS last_year FROM serving.fact_prices f JOIN serving.dim_product p ON f.product_key=p.product_key JOIN serving.dim_time t ON f.time_key=t.time_key WHERE f.price_mad IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.product_id, p.category ORDER BY points DESC
